final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing technical infographic illustrating step-by-step deployment of Hermes inside a Docker container with GLMCodingPlan integration, designed as a clear instructional diagram for a developer knowledge-sharing platform.

Style/medium: flat-design technical infographic, developer documentation illustration style
Composition: vertical four-panel layout, each panel numbered 1–4 in bold, connected by downward arrows showing sequential flow
Subject: 
  Step 1 — Pull & run Docker container: terminal window showing `docker pull hermes` and `docker run` command, Docker whale icon
  Step 2 — Install & configure Hermes inside container: file directory tree, config file snippet, Hermes logo/label
  Step 3 — Integrate GLMCodingPlan: code editor panel showing GLMCodingPlan API connection config, arrows linking Hermes service to GLMCodingPlan module
  Step 4 — Verify & test deployment: terminal output showing success logs, green checkmark, running service status
Scene/backdrop: light neutral background with subtle grid, each step panel in a rounded card
Lighting/mood: clean, flat, technical clarity
Color palette: cool blue and white as base, accent green for success states, orange for highlights on step numbers
Materials/textures: flat vector, no gradients, crisp icon strokes
Text (verbatim): "1" "2" "3" "4" labels on each step panel; "Docker" "Hermes" "GLMCodingPlan" as panel titles
Constraints: all 4 steps clearly numbered and visually separated, sequential flow arrows between panels, text labels legible at reading size
Avoid: 3D effects, photorealistic rendering, decorative flourishes unrelated to technical content, cramped overlapping panels
